title: lathyrus shaffneri
intro: Lathyrus shaffneri, also known as the Shaffner's pea or Shaffner's vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Lathyrus. It is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus shaffneri is often used as a tea or tincture to reap its medicinal benefits, and it is also used in poultices and salves to treat skin conditions.
